revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十三]][[zh:六月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十三]][[zh:六月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十三]][[zh:六月十三]] <!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:6 nguŏk 13 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:6月13日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 6월 13일]][[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:六月十三]][[zh:六月十三]]
{{Not to be confused with|June 13|qq=June 13}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=六月十三|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 6월 13일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar June|qq=}} '''June 13''' is the 13th day of month {{ill|June (Lunisolar)|ja|6月 (旧暦)|lt=June (Minazuki)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/June (Lunisolar)|qq=}} the 6th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}} . It's {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Shakkō|ja|赤口|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shakkō|1=Shakkō|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11635368}} .
== Events == * Year 22 of {{ill|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|ja|Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko|2=ja|3=推古天皇|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Empress Suiko|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q298057}} ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|614|en|614|qid=Q31064|lt=614|1=614}} ) – {{ill|Inugami no Mitasuki|en|Inugami no Mitasuki|qid=Q11571158|lt=Inukai no Mikoto|1=Inugami no Mitasuki}} and others departed for the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|qid=Q7405|lt=Sui dynasty|1=Sui dynasty}} as the last official Japanese envoys to China. * Year 15 of {{ill|Tianbao (Tang)|ja|天宝 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tianbao (Tang)|1=Tianbao|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10939391}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|756|en|756|qid=Q31121|lt=756|1=756}} ) – Due to the rebellion led by {{ill|An Lushan|en|An Lushan|qid=Q360559|lt=An Lushan|1=An Lushan}} , Emperor {{ill|Emperor Xuanzong of Tang|en|Emperor Xuanzong of Tang|qid=Q9746|lt=Xuanzong of Tang|1=Emperor Xuanzong of Tang}} fled the capital, accompanied by his consort {{ill|Yang Guifei|en|Yang Guifei|qid=Q298046|lt=Yang Guifei|1=Yang Guifei}} . * Year 13 of {{ill|Enryaku|en|Enryaku|qid=Q1373176|lt=Enryaku|1=Enryaku}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|794|en|794|qid=Q30887|lt=794|1=794}} ) – Under orders from {{ill|Emperor Kanmu|en|Emperor Kanmu|qid=Q314846|lt=Emperor Kanmu|1=Emperor Kanmu}} , {{ill|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|en|Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|qid=Q941979|lt=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro|1=Sakanoue no Tamuramaro}} departed to lead a campaign against the {{ill|Emishi|ja|Ezo|1=Emishi|2=ja|3=蝦夷|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q932574}} . * Year 1 of {{ill|Kashō|en|Kashō|qid=Q1373157|lt=Kashō|1=Kashō}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 16|en|July 16|qid=Q2731|lt=July 16|1=July 16}} , {{ill|848|en|848|qid=Q30380|lt=848|1=848}} ) – The era name changed from {{ill|Jōwa (Heian period)|en|Jōwa (Heian period)|qid=Q1075605|lt=Jōwa (Japan)|1=Jōwa (Heian period)}} to Kashō. * Year 10 of {{ill|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|en|Tenshō (Momoyama period)|qid=Q1145058|lt=Tenshō Era|1=Tenshō (Momoyama period)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 2|en|July 2|qid=Q2697|lt=July 2|1=July 2}} , {{ill|1582|en|1582|qid=Q6719|lt=1582|1=1582}} ) – {{ill|Battle of Yamazaki|en|Battle of Yamazaki|qid=Q39040|lt=Battle of Yamazaki|1=Battle of Yamazaki}} – {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qid=Q187550|lt=Toyotomi Hideyoshi|1=Toyotomi Hideyoshi}} (then known as Hashiba Hideyoshi) defeated {{ill|Akechi Mitsuhide|en|Akechi Mitsuhide|qid=Q313320|lt=Akechi Mitsuhide|1=Akechi Mitsuhide}} , who was later killed while fleeing. * Year 20 of {{ill|Keichō|en|Keichō|qid=Q1328185|lt=Keichō|1=Keichō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|August 7|en|August 7|qid=Q2781|lt=August 7|1=August 7}} , {{ill|1615|en|1615|qid=Q6784|lt=1615|1=1615}} ) – The {{ill|Edo shogunate|ja|Tokugawa shogunate|1=Tokugawa shogunate|2=ja|3=江戸幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Edo shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} issued the {{ill|Ikkoku Ichijōrei|ja|一国一城令|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ikkoku Ichijōrei|1=Law of One Castle per Province|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10863871}} , restricting each domain to one castle. (Intercalary month) * Year 10 of [[Kansei]]{{efn|January 1789 through February 1801|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kansei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 26|en|July 26|qid=Q2723|lt=July 26|1=July 26}} , {{ill|1798|en|1798|qid=Q7823|lt=1798|1=1798}} ) – {{ill|Motoori Norinaga|en|Motoori Norinaga|qid=Q384647|lt=Motoori Norinaga|1=Motoori Norinaga}} completed his 44-volume commentary on the {{ill|Kojiki|en|Kojiki|qid=Q813031|lt=Kojiki|1=Kojiki}} , known as the {{ill|Kojiki-den|en|Kojiki-den|qid=Q11410835|lt=Kojikiden|1=Kojiki-den}} . * Year 3 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 14|en|July 14|qid=Q2691|lt=July 14|1=July 14}} , {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} ) – {{ill|Urakami Yoban Kuzure|en|Urakami Yoban Kuzure|qid=Q7899579|lt=Urakami Yoban Kuzure|1=Urakami Yoban Kuzure}} – 68 Christians were arrested in Nagasaki by the shogunate authorities.
== Births == * Year 7 of {{ill|Dàtǒng|ja|大統|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Dàtǒng|1=Datong|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q5368079}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 21|en|July 21|qid=Q2727|lt=July 21|1=July 21}} , {{ill|541|en|541|qid=Q30870|lt=541|1=541}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Wen of Sui|en|Emperor Wen of Sui|qid=Q7418|lt=Wen of Sui|1=Emperor Wen of Sui}} , first emperor of the {{ill|Sui dynasty|en|Sui dynasty|qid=Q7405|lt=Sui dynasty|1=Sui dynasty}} (d. {{ill|604|en|604|qid=Q31048|lt=604|1=604}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Zhēnguān|ja|貞観 (唐)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Zhēnguān|1=Zhenguan era|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1042896}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 19|en|July 19|qid=Q2726|lt=July 19|1=July 19}} , {{ill|628|en|628|qid=Q30592|lt=628|1=628}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Emperor Gaozong of Tang|en|Emperor Gaozong of Tang|qid=Q9703|lt=Gaozong of Tang|1=Emperor Gaozong of Tang}} , third emperor of the Tang dynasty (d. {{ill|683|en|683|qid=Q33496|lt=683|1=683}} ) * Year 1 of [[Ōei]]{{efn|July 1394 through April 1428|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōei|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|1394|en|1394|qid=Q6398|lt=1394|1=1394}} ) – {{ill|Ashikaga Yoshinori|en|Ashikaga Yoshinori|qid=Q239170|lt=Ashikaga Yoshinori|1=Ashikaga Yoshinori}} , 6th {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}} of the {{ill|Muromachi shogunate|ja|Ashikaga Shogunate|1=Ashikaga shogunate|2=ja|3=室町幕府|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi shogunate|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1154406}} (d. {{ill|1441|en|1441|qid=Q6402|lt=1441|1=1441}} ) * Year 1 of {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 20|en|July 20|qid=Q2728|lt=July 20|1=July 20}} , {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} ) – {{ill|Nobu Shirase|en|Nobu Shirase|qid=Q715832|lt=Shirase Nobu|1=Nobu Shirase}} , army lieutenant and first Japanese explorer to reach Antarctica (d. {{ill|1946|en|1946|qid=Q18610|lt=1946|1=1946}} ) * Year 2 of {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} (Gregorian calendar {{ill|July 24|en|July 24|qid=Q2721|lt=July 24|1=July 24}} , {{ill|1866|en|1866|qid=Q7712|lt=1866|1=1866}} ) – {{ill|Kaneko Naokichi|ja|金子直吉|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kaneko Naokichi|1=Kaneko Naokichi|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11646838}} , businessman and manager of {{ill|Suzuki Shōten|ja|鈴木商店|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Suzuki Shōten|1=Suzuki Shōten|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11648682}} (d. {{ill|1944|en|1944|qid=Q5268|lt=1944|1=1944}} )
== Deaths == * Year 1 of {{ill|Taika (era)|en|Taika (era)|qid=Q1077930|lt=Taika|1=Taika (era)}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 11|en|July 11|qid=Q2701|lt=July 11|1=July 11}} , {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} ) – {{ill|Soga no Emishi|ja|蘇我Ezo|1=Soga no Emishi|2=ja|3=蘇我蝦夷|qid=Q1292368|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Soga no Emishi|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1292368}} , father of {{ill|Soga no Iruka|en|Soga no Iruka|qid=Q736621|lt=Soga no Iruka|1=Soga no Iruka}} , and son of {{ill|Soga no Umako|en|Soga no Umako|qid=Q1191233|lt=Soga no Umako|1=Soga no Umako}} * Year 7 of {{ill|Tiānfú|ja|天福 (後晋)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiānfú|1=Tianfu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10940571}} (Julian calendar {{ill|July 28|en|July 28|qid=Q2718|lt=July 28|1=July 28}} , {{ill|942|en|942|qid=Q23740|lt=942|1=942}} ) – Emperor {{ill|Shi Jingtang|en|Shi Jingtang|qid=Q1189495|lt=Shi Jingtang|1=Shi Jingtang}} , founding emperor of the {{ill|Later Jin (Five Dynasties)|en|Later Jin (Five Dynasties)|qid=Q1154540|lt=Later Jin (Five Dynasties)|1=Later Jin (Five Dynasties)}} (b. {{ill|892|en|892|qid=Q30593|lt=892|1=892}} )
== See Also ==
{{Lunar Calendar See Also|6|12|6|14|5|13|7|6|0613|qq=}}
==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 6월 13일]] [[ja:6月13日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:六月十三]]
[[ar:June 13 (Lunisolar)]] <!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月十三]] <!--zhwiki derived wikidata interwikis--> [[zh-min-nan:6 goe̍h 13 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]] [[zh-yue:六月十三]] {{wikidata link|Q839652}} [[Category:Days 13 of Japanese Lunar months]] [[Category:Days of the Japanese Lunisolar Calendar]] [[Category:Lunisolar June]] [[Category:Shakkō]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]] [[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
